findings.title: Overly permissive CORS with origin reflection and credentials
findings.description: CORS middleware reflects arbitrary Origin header into Access-Control-Allow-Origin while enabling credentials

findings.title: Gin debug mode with server version disclosure
findings.description: Gin set to DebugMode and server header middleware reveals Go runtime and Gin framework versions

findings.title: Relaxed XML parser configuration disables strict mode
findings.description: XML decoder created with Strict=false, disabling strict XML parsing and reducing defense-in-depth

findings.title: Verbose error responses expose stack traces to clients
findings.description: XML import error handler returns debug.Stack() output in JSON error response

findings.title: Unrestricted settings modification without authentication
findings.description: PUT /api/settings allows any unauthenticated user to modify security-critical application settings

findings.title: Diagnostics endpoint exposes credentials and environment variables
findings.description: Admin diagnostics returns database credentials, os.Environ(), and runtime information
